都市—黑道—带脑子—慢热爽文
白雪飞舞
监狱门口。
23岁的王云站在监狱大门外，仰头望着灰蒙蒙的天空。
五年之前他杀死了凌辱他母亲的张三，今天是他刑满释放的日子。
可是王云回到了家，却发现他母亲已经死了，尸体被埋葬到了——乱葬岗
未尝他人苦，莫劝他人善。
这一刻，王云发誓一定要好好活着，不光要活着，还要过的好，比别人更好。
有朝一日虎归山，定叫血染半边天；
有朝一日龙抬头，定让黄河水倒流！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/00f92dc9ce2c7d8cbe243104cdbf0122","author":"可爱的胖头鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7525434125293997118","book_name":"江湖路远：我掌东北势","book_short_name":"江湖路远：我掌东北势","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9413人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":826,"name":"黑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=826&name=黑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7525434170001080894","read_count":"9413","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"905318"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"406","tags":"都市日常,都市,黑道,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/30d2f2ecdd02bdebd4110f00f3ff4d5b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779272827&x-signature=EY8sDY22mmeMtp4MfkYAl9V5aCg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2805572570978557","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"10"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321182707F1284B20FF565FEFB0B4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读59分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":1,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3517,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":10459},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"753029723088674
